findings: LWC accepts unix-second OHLC from okx_*_15m_*.csv with zero backend change (script→static JSON).
Interactive zoom makes mid-cluster hardneg vs right-edge tip geometry easier to judge than static PNG alone.
LWC display MAs ≠ YOLO six-MA cv2 render — must NOT feed LWC screenshots to detector.
Dense box as time-band is readable for debug; precise YOLO box still needs series-primitive or keep PNG.
